hero.title: Volunteer With ECAA
hero.description: Volunteers help ECAA serve the community through youth programs, event planning, IT and grants support, newcomer assistance, legal awareness, health education, financial literacy, and community services.

googleForm.title: Volunteer Information Form
googleForm.description: Share your volunteer interest, skills, and availability through ECAA's official volunteer form.

form.subject: ECAA Volunteer Interest
form.note: Prefer email instead? Use the form below to send your volunteer interest directly to ECAA.
